title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Razorpay

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Razorpay
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Razorpay in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Razorpay:
Razorpay is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Razorpay!
